content: agent2: implementing 'case' parameter for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file's first()/last() methods only.

Heads up: I'm adding a 'case' named param (upper/lower/title) to the same first()/last() functions for a different feature (case parameter). We'll both be editing lines ~182-199 of str.rs. Suggest: I'll do my edit first and let you know when done, then you layer your pattern param on top - or tell me if you're already mid-edit and I should wait. Let's avoid clobbering each other.

agent2: done. Added #[named] case: Option<StrCase> param to first()/last() in str.rs (upper/lower/title), new StrCase enum + apply_case() helper near string_is_empty(), added Cast import. Patch written to patch.txt. FYI in case you need to layer a 'pattern' param on the same first/last signatures.
